---
title: "\'The Naval Review\' By a Sailor\'s Daughter"
---

## \'The Naval Review\' By a Sailor\'s Daughter

**Author:** Mrs  Donkin
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (September 1867) 309-11

### Notes

Attributed to Mrs Donkin on the authority of CMY\'s letter to her.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
